title: chrysothamnus nauseosus subsp. nanus
intro: Chrysothamnus nauseosus subsp. nanus, also known as dwarf rubber rabbitbrush, is a shrub that belongs to the Asteraceae family and is native to the western United States. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial compounds. The plant is said to have several health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving pain, and supporting the immune system. Herbal preparations of the dwarf rubber rabbitbrush include teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to treat various ailments, such as respiratory issues and wounds.
